description: Convert analysis, findings, or a story into a LinkedIn-ready post or article with platform-native formatting — applies lens concern self-assessment, builds from workspace evidence. Use this instead of writing posts directly.
usage: linkedin post, write for linkedin, social post from research, turn this into a linkedin article, post about this on linkedin, linkedin content, thought leadership post

target.description: What to write about — a topic, or refers to upstream findings in a chain

length.description: 'post' for a short LinkedIn post (~150-300 words), 'article' for long-form (~800-1500 words)

hook.description: A specific opening line or angle to lead with. If omitted, one is crafted from the content.
